DescribeLLMTraces.filters: List of filter conditions. Supported filter fields: service (application name), traceId (Trace ID), sessionId (session ID), userId (user ID), duration (response time in ms), inputTokens (input token count), outputTokens (output token count), totalTokens (total token count)
DescribeLLMTraces.filters.op: Filter operator. Options: `=` - equal, `:` - equal, `!=` - not equal, `contains` - contains, `in` - in array, `>` - greater than, `>=` - greater than or equal to, `<` - less than, `<=` - less than or equal to
DescribeLLMTraces.filters.value: Single value, applicable to operators: =, !=, contains, >, >=, <, <=
DescribeLLMTraces.filters.values: Multiple values, applicable to operator: in
DescribeLLMTraces.orderBy: Sort field. Default: startTime. Options: startTime (start time), duration (duration), totalTokens (total token count)
DescribeLLMTraces.pageSize: Number of items per page. Maximum: 100
